sn_aia_tool.description: Looks up an existing warranty claim record by number or sys_id to retrieve its details.
sn_aia_tool.input_schema: [{"name":"identifier","description":"Claim number or sys_id to look up","mandatory":false},{"name":"crudInputs","description":"CRUD Input Variables. These are already pre-defined. Under no circumstances should you prompt the user for this information or attempt to change these values.","mandatory":true}]
sn_aia_tool.name: Lookup Warranty Claim Record
